strings.registrationDescription: Use the following page to submit your National Society's interest in following the Early Action Protocol (EAP) application process. Once you submit this form, the EAP team members will contact you to start the procedure. You can find more information on the process and different ways to apply {link}
strings.nationalSocietyDescription: Select National Society that is planning to apply for the EAP
strings.countryDescription: The country will be pre-populated based on the NS selection, but can be adapted as needed.
strings.disasterTypeDescription: Select the disaster type for which the EAP is needed.
strings.typeDescription: Select the EAP type. Find details of both under this link.
strings.submissionDescription: Include the proposed time of submission, accounting for the time it will take to deliver the application.
strings.partnersInvolvedDescription: Select from the list the partners involved in this process. Add as many as needed or select not applicable if no partners involved.
strings.nsContactDescription: National Society contact responsible for the EAP process
strings.ifrcContactDescription: The most senior staff in the National Society responsible and knowledgable about the disaster event.
strings.focalPointDescription: The DREF contact person form IFRC
strings.registrationFailure: Sorry could not register new EAP right now!
strings.successModalDescription: Thank you for notifying us about the start of your EAP process. We look forward to your completed application.
